channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: O/s 48 a, 17th July
item.description:
Smelly drain, constant smell affecting the neighbourhood and their properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rudall Crescent, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive FUCK FIFA on window and wall of housing association block and telecom box, 17th July
item.description:
Really offensive - put on during World Cup- want it removed immediately

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillingdon Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CityEV charger 6148 not working, 17th July
item.description:
No power light showing and no power on CityEV electric vehicle charger 6148, Park Avenue N3 2EJ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Improper disposal of catering equipment, 17th July
item.description:
Dumped on the street, no indication that proper procedures are being followed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive weed growth, 17th July
item.description:
Excessive weed growth in the Roupell/Theed/Whittlesey street, conservation area (SE1 8SP, SE1 8SZ and SE1 8ST)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Roupell Street, Waterloo, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Grove, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Tipping, 17th July
item.description:
Dumped washer

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicars Moor Lane, Southgate

item.title: Beacon hit MONTHS ago still leaning and not lit, 17th July
item.description:
C522 Post bent and not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gridlock on roads, 17th July
item.description:
Residents have had to go out to direct traffic as tempers flare, just watched an ambulance stuck in the traffic as it heads to slades gardens. Close slades gardens and only allow residents to access through windmill gardens. We asked one person in car why they came down past a closed road sign “well this road isn’t closed “ didn’t bother to see for access for residents only

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Gardens, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - blocked by private hedge, 17th July
item.description:
P193
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raglan Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illuminated sign - out, 17th July
item.description:
P193 Light above give way is out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Sign faded and plate missing, 17th July
item.description:
P936 Sign plate faded and sign plate missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Traffic light stuck on Red - one way road, 17th July
item.description:
Traffic light stuck on Red - one way road and after back up off cars hard to exit the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Plumstead High Street, Plumstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation blocking footpath, 17th July
item.description:
The vegetation on the footpath is overgrown and is blocking the footpath .This requires trimming( see photo)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NW6 7ER at the Junction of glengall road and hazelmere road, 17th July
item.description:
Someone has put something very rotten into one of the recycled bins. It smells absolutely appalling like a dead animal and is attracting a lot of flies. Can you please have the bin emptied. We cannot control what goes into air bins as they are on the public pathway, and there is nowhere else to leave them.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned food waste containers on pavement, 17th July
item.description:
These food waste containers outside 114 Greenwood Road are full of miscellaneous rubbish which is attracting flies etc. The refuse operators naturally won't touch them. The landlord doesn't do anything about it. This is a health hazard in the heat.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small fridge and some railings, 17th July
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a small fridge and some railings.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ramsgate Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley Full of Rubbish Outside 30 Caldy Road; Flies Buzzing, 17th July
item.description:
Trolley on pavement in front of 30 Caldy Road is full of rubbish - presumably food rubbish, due to the amount of flies buzzing around it. Please remove. It is unhygienic and poses a health and safety risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Caldy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous fly tipping, 17th July
item.description:
Fridge and other things left which is fire hazard!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whinchat Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
